description:
Tomasz Bura, a Poland-born London-based jazz pianist, composer and bandleader,
is a key voice on the European jazz scene, known for his acclaimed albums
Ritual and The Room Upstairs and performances at iconic stages such as Ronnie
Scott’s. Together, they deliver an immersive set that bridges classical
elegance, jazz freedom, and contemporary expression.

address.streetAddress: Windmills, 6th Floor, 331, Road 5B, EPIP ZoneBangalore

name: Windmills Music Night - A Night Of Gershwin & Hollywood Classics

performer.description: LOLA G is a Moscow-born soprano and recording artist celebrated for her ability to move effortlessly between classical, jazz and contemporary worlds. Trained at the Purcell School, Guildhall School of Music & Drama and the Royal Academy of Music, she has performed internationally at prestigious venues and festivals.
performer.name: A Night Of Gershwin & Hollywood Classics

description:
Formed in the late 1990s, the band gained international attention with their
acclaimed debut Bahamut, praised for its adventurous fusion of styles and
featured on major broadcasts such as NPR’s All Things Considered. Over the
years, Hazmat Modine has continued to evolve through bold collaborations and
energetic live performances, releasing standout records including Cicada,
Extra-Deluxe-Supreme, Box of Breath, and Bonfire. Their music is both timeless
and surprising—raw, soulful, and joyfully unbound by genre.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Hazmat Modine - Good Friend Tour - Hyd

performer.description: Rattling with the sounds of migration from the caldron of New York City, Hazmat Modine returns to Europe rejuvenated, just in time for spring. They will be serving u the bones of American music on a platter of silver, brass, reeds, electric guitars, violin, and vocal harmonies, and as always, presided over by the dashing harmonica wizard Wade Schuman. Hazmat will be presenting music from their much-anticipated magnum opus, ostensibly entitled Extra-Deluxe-Supreme. The songs present allegories of triumph and tragedy. Musically, the inspiration is drawn from Memphis and Rock Steady- garnished with the sounds of Egyptian Afro-Pop, American roots and Tuvan Soul. Set to simmer, it's blended and distilled into a distinctive Hazmatian stew.
performer.name: Hazmat Modine

address.streetAddress: Windmills, 6th Floor, 331, Road 5B, EPIP ZoneBangalore

name: Windmills Music Night - Hazmat Modine - Good Friend Tour

performer.description: Hazmat Modine is a New York City–based band led by singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist Wade Schuman, known for turning roots music into something wildly original and impossible to categorize. Drawing from blues at its core, their sound expands into folk, jazz, and global traditions, powered by an uncommon lineup that can include harmonica, tuba, trumpet, saxophone, trombone, drums, banjo, guitar, and violin—all woven together with rich vocal harmonies.
performer.name: Hazmat Modine

description:
Their self-titled debut album was released at the 2019 Mahindra Blues
Festival, where they shared the stage with legends like Charlie Musselwhite,
Beth Hart, and Sugaray Rayford. They returned to the festival in 2023, opening
the show and jamming with icons such as Christone “Kingfish” Ingram, Taj
Mahal, and Buddy Guy. With growing acclaim from audiences and artists alike,
the Arinjoy Trio has become one of India’s most sought-after blues bands.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - The Arinjoy Trio Live! - Hyd

performer.description: Formed in 2015, The Arinjoy Trio is one of the most exciting blues acts to emerge from the Indian music scene. Led by acclaimed guitarist and vocalist Arinjoy Sarkar, the trio also features Sounak Roy on drums and Aakash Ganguly on bass. Known for their high-energy live performances, the trio brings together a wide range of blues styles—from Chicago blues and blues rock to R&B—delivered with authenticity and passion.
performer.name: Arinjoy Trio

description:
Following the loss of their iconic vocalist Mangey Khan, the group begins a
new chapter with Bhura Khan—nephew of Lakha Khan—alongside dholak maestro
Magada Khan and multi-instrumentalist Sawai Khan. With spirit, innovation, and
pride, Barmer Boys continue to reimagine folk with attitude, carrying the
Manganiyar legacy to global stages.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Barmer Boys - Hyd

performer.description: Barmer Boys are the torchbearers of Rajasthan’s Manganiyar musical tradition, bringing ancient folk and Sufi sounds into the 21st century. Known for their soulful kalaams, Krishna bhajans, celebratory wedding songs, and electrifying jams with beatboxing, the trio has performed over 250 concerts across 25 countries, with appearances at Roskilde, WOMAD, FMM Sines, and NH7 Weekender.
performer.name: Barmer Boys

description:
Blending Bruce’s genre-fluid guitar and compositional sensibility with
Pallavi’s evocative interpretations, Kayaka weaves Western acoustic folk,
blues, world music, and jazz with Indian folk and classical traditions,
creating a stirring, thought-provoking musical experience.

address.streetAddress: Windmills, 6th Floor, 331, Road 5B, EPIP ZoneBangalore

name: Windmills Music Night - Kayaka - BLR

performer.description: Kayaka (‘work’) brings together renowned Bangalore musicians MD Pallavi and Bruce Lee Mani to reimagine ancient, progressive Indian poetry within a contemporary musical framework. Drawing primarily from the Vachanas - powerful 11th-century verses written by cobblers, weavers, sex workers, and other working-class voices. The concert foregrounds radical thought that remains strikingly relevant today. A recipient of the prestigious Vachanasri Award, Pallavi has long engaged with this body of work.
performer.name: Kayaka

description:
At the heart of this collaboration lies a deep exploration: how the violin and
nagaswaram—melodic instruments from divergent lineages—converse, contrast, and
complement one another. Alongside, the rhythmic dialogue between mridangam and
thavil unfolds with equal intrigue and intensity. Crafted with careful
attention to the sonic and musical identities of each instrument, every
performance is a journey—blending composition with improvisation, structure
with spontaneity. It is not merely a fusion, but a celebration of what emerges
when boundaries are set aside and traditions meet in free-flowing expression.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - A Carnatic Quartet - HYD

performer.description: Curated by violinist Shreya Devnath, this Quartet is a unique confluence of four masterful artistes and two powerful instrumental pairings—each rooted in distinct cultural traditions within the Carnatic idiom.
performer.name: A Carnatic Quartet

description:
His NAACP Image Award–nominated album Creole Orchestra topped JazzWeek’s 2024
charts, affirming his role as a leading contemporary jazz innovator. Beyond
the stage, he mentors emerging artists as Professor of Studio Music and Jazz
at the University of Miami Frost School of Music, shaping future generations
through scholarship and sound.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Etienne Charles - Creole Soul - HYD

performer.description: Trinidad-born trumpeter, composer, and cultural storyteller Etienne Charles creates music that uncovers overlooked histories and celebrates community memory. Praised for his warm tone, layered orchestrations, and rhythmic vitality rooted in Caribbean traditions, his work bridges jazz with social narrative. Through projects such as San Juan Hill – A New York Story, Gullah Roots, and Carnival: The Sound of a People, Charles transforms archival research into immersive performance, amplifying voices often absent from mainstream history.
performer.name: Etienne Charles - Creole Soul

description:
Their debut album Second Nature explores memory, belonging, and personal
transformation through intimate storytelling. The forthcoming R‑Evolution
expands outward — a groove-driven meditation on climate, power, protest, and
collective reimagining — inviting listeners not just to hear, but to inhabit
the music.

address.streetAddress: Windmills, 6th Floor, 331, Road 5B, EPIP ZoneBangalore

name: Windmills Music Night - Sage For The Ages - BLR

performer.description: Sage for The Ages creates immersive music for the dreamer-listener — soundscapes where jazz improvisation meets neo-soul warmth, psychedelic color, and ambient depth. Led by writer, vocalist, and guitarist Kirtana Krishna, the band balances inward reflection with social awareness, turning lived experience into atmosphere and narrative. Pianist Aman Mahajan shapes the music with surprising harmonic pathways, bassist Dhani Muniz structures each piece with a producer’s ear for tone and space, and drummer Raul Mattia grounds the ensemble in steady, intentional motion.
performer.name: Sage For The Ages

description:
"It is an aural punch in the gut, delivered with a velvet glove. The raw power
of Sarvjeet Tamta's vocals makes one shake one's head in wonder and then shake
it many more times with the sheer joy that infuses the music. It is not easy
to resist the magnetic charm, the sheer power of the music that comes from the
very depths of their hearts and reaches the very depths of the listeners' as
well." - Sarthak Kaushik, 104.6FM.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Rehmat-e-Nusrat Live: Qawwali Unplugged - HYD

performer.description: Formed by lead vocalist & harmonium virtuoso Sarvjeet Tamta, Rehmat-e-Nusrat brings a fresh new perspective to the timeless tradition of qawwali music. These young musicians perform original compositions and qawwalis, Sufiyana kalaams by great poets, and Kabir bhajans.
performer.name: Rehmat-e-Nusrat
